title: elaeocarpus photiniifolius
intro: Elaeocarpus photiniifolius, commonly known as the Borneo blue forget-me-not, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of fever, headache, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus photiniifolius include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as acting as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
